notes.q1_coverage_rationale: 36.4% raw coverage (43 terms / 118 source files). This appears low but is healthy for this codebase because: (1) All domain entities, services, repositories, and major architectural components are covered, (2) The remaining files are primarily small utilities, types, and component implementations that are appropriately consolidated into broader concepts, (3) Adding more terms would violate the consolidation principle stated in the autopilot instruction. The 43 terms represent the canonical concepts after consolidation from 129 original terms (66.7% reduction).
